messages.content: What are the largest planets in our solar system?
The four largest planets in our solar system are Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, and Neptune.

source.title: Jupiter — Wikipedia
source.snippet: Jupiter is the fifth planet from the Sun and the largest in the Solar System.

source.title: Saturn — Wikipedia
source.snippet: Saturn is the sixth planet from the Sun and the second-largest in the Solar System.

source.title: Uranus — Wikipedia
source.snippet: Uranus is the seventh planet from the Sun and the third-largest by diameter.

source.title: Neptune — Wikipedia
source.snippet: Neptune is the eighth planet from the Sun and the fourth-largest by diameter.
